name: You May Be a Fool...but I Still Love You

issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is invalid. Should be 'StartOfTurn' for a Main card effect that checks conditions at turn start.
Missing condition. Card requires condition: Life ≤ 3 (HasLifeCards or equivalent with numeric comparison).

Action type 'PowerBoost' is incorrect. Effect restricts life gain, not boosts power. Requires a negative action or restriction mechanic (e.g., 'PreventLifeGain' or similar restriction keyword, not PowerBoost).

Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Text states 'during this turn' which means the restriction lasts until end of turn, but the DSL structure doesn't support ability restrictions—this requires a special keyword or mechanic not currently modeled.
